posts.text: Chartbook 437 Unseasonal war (2): Europe, gas & yet another February war. Aka, "oops ... we did it again!"  . In a post I did yesterday, I highlighted the way that Israel and America’s attack on Iran is ramifying through markets you might not be thinking about, like fertilizers.

posts.text: Chartbook 436 Unseasonal war. How the US-Israeli war on Iran threatens the global agricultural cycle. . One impact of the war being waged by the US and Israel against Iran that is not getting as much attention as it deserves, is the impact on the global supply of fertilizer.
